title: Into the Depths
description: A recreation of my original mod-pack, but with a lot more content to enhance your game.
body:
A recreation of my original Mod-Pack(CB's Horror Pack) which is now outdated and buggy. This modpack plans to reinvent minecraft horror while still feeling vanilla.

# Whats included: 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- The Man From the Fog
- From the Fog
- Paranoia
- Sanity: Descent into Madness
- Distant Friends
- Weeping Angles

</details>


  
  
 And so much more!
  If your looking for a true scare then this is the modpack for you.

  Warning!: This modpack is not for the faint of heart is you are prone to seizures,  epilepsy, or screaming then this modpack is not for you!

  
  # Recommended Resource Packs:
-   Golden Days Base(Below)
-   Golden Days Alpha(Above)
##   Recommended Shaders:
-   Insanity Shaders Link: [Insanity Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/insanity-shader)

My personal shader recommendation is PSX style shaders which I cannot upload for copyright reasons: [PSX MC SHADERS](https://github.com/ckosmic/minecraft-psx)

### Recommended Settings:
- For Low end devices: 50% Allocated
- For High end devices: 85% Allocated








If you have any issues please feel free to email me at: cbrown3917@outlook.com
